market_summary: Art market maintains steady growth (4% in 2025). High-end segment remains robust, while the mid-market is adjusting. Focus remains on provenance and long-term value.
art_insights: The market is stabilizing post-volatility. Collectors are prioritizing quality and verified history over speculative trends. Current sentiment is cautiously optimistic with a preference for high-value physical assets.
key_events: Market trend: Flight to quality and physical/hybrid experience
